parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant NavBar
participant ReduxStore
participant UserActions
participant UserReducer
participant ProfileMiddleware
participant Solid.js
database POD

activate NavBar
NavBar -> ReduxStore : loadEmailRequest()
activate ReduxStore
ReduxStore -> UserActions : dispatch(loadEmailRequest())
activate UserActions
UserActions -> ProfileMiddleware : loadEmailRequest()
destroy UserActions
activate ProfileMiddleware
ProfileMiddleware -> Solid.js : getEmail()
activate Solid.js
Solid.js -> POD : getEmail()
activate POD
POD --> Solid.js : email
destroy POD
ProfileMiddleware -> UserReducer : loadEmailRequest()
activate UserReducer
UserReducer --> ReduxStore : state
destroy UserReducer

alt email successfully loaded
    Solid.js --> ProfileMiddleware : email
    destroy Solid.js
    ReduxStore -> UserActions : dispatch(loadEmailSuccess(email))
    activate UserActions
    UserActions -> UserReducer : loadEmailSuccess(email)
    destroy UserActions
    activate UserReducer
    UserReducer -> UserReducer : updateState(email)
    UserReducer --> ReduxStore : updated state with email
    destroy UserReducer
else error at loading email
    Solid.js --> ProfileMiddleware : error
    destroy Solid.js
    ReduxStore -> UserActions : dispatch(loadEmailError(error))
    activate UserActions
    UserActions -> UserReducer : loadEmailError(error)
    destroy UserActions
    activate UserReducer
    UserReducer -> UserReducer : updateState(error)
    UserReducer --> ReduxStore : updated state
    destroy UserReducer
end
destroy ProfileMiddleware

ReduxStore --> NavBar : state
deactivate ReduxStore
deactivate NavBar

legend right
  line = method
  dash line = data
endlegend
@enduml
```
